gender.help: single-selection with str as default, option-menu, no user option can be added when range.max==1

language.help: multi-selection with list as default; allow user to add new option when range.max==null

portfolio.help: file browser, with add/remove/paste, single-selection when range.max is 1, multi-selection when range.max is null

show_hobbies.help: boolean, as master to a slave set

music_collections.title: Music Collection Folders:
music_collections.help: folder browser, similar with file browser

auto_save_preset.title: Auto-save parameters as preset:
auto_save_preset.help: boolean, global settings, always default to false in generated CLI even if it's true here; settings group is always persistent as <app_name>.settings.json, lazy-created on startup and saved on change; on change, always save a fixed file; on success, save to a time-stamped file to preset folder and also the session folder

enable_debug_log.help: boolean, global settings, useful for collecting runtime diagnostics for data analysis, but better disabled in production for optimal performance
